title: olearia haastii
intro: Olearia haastii, also known as the mountain daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its white or pink flowers and silvery-green leaves. The medicinal properties of Olearia haastii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support respiratory health. Olearia haastii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
